zh.lifeSummary: 當Katharine Kilham於大約1605年出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，她的父親Henry Kilham48歲，母親Alice Goodale46歲。她於1628年10月22日與Robert Goodale在英國英格蘭素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1666年9月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katharine Kilham于大约1605年出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲Henry Kilham48岁，母亲Alice Goodale46岁。她于1628年10月22日与Robert Goodale在英国英格兰素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1666年9月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kilham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kilham (ER Yorks), Kilham in Cantley (WR Yorks), or Kilham in Kirknewton (Northumb).

variants.name: Killham
meanings: English: from any of several places in northern England called Kilham, most of which are recorded as Killum in medieval documents, from an Old English prepositional phrase meaning ‘at the kilns’.

variants.name: Killam
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): variant of Kilham, a habitational name from any of the places in Northumberland and Yorkshire, so named either from Old English cylnum ‘(at) the kilns’, dative plural of cyln, or from Old English cyln ‘kiln’ or the personal name Cylla + Old Norse holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Katharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Katherine , associated by folk etymology with Greek katharos ‘pure’. This is the preferred spelling in Germany. It is also the one used in the name of the American film star Katharine Hepburn ( 1907–2003 ).

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Katharine Kilham was born about 1605, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, her father, Henry Kilham, was 48 and her mother, Alice Goodale, was 46. She married Robert Goodale on 22 October 1628, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 10 September 1666, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katharine Kilham est née environ 1605, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry Kilham, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice Goodale, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Goodale le 22 octobre 1628, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1666, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine Kilham è nata il circa 1605 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Henry Kilham, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Alice Goodale, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Robert Goodale il 22 ottobre 1628, nel Dennington, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 settembre 1666, nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katharine Kilhamが約1605年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Henry Kilhamは48歳，母Alice Goodaleは46歳であった。1628年10月22日にイギリスイギリススフォルクデニントンでRobert Goodaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1666年9月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katharine Kilham(이)가 대략 1605년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Kilham(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Goodale(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1628년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Robert Goodale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1666년 9월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine Kilham nasceu aproximadamente 1605, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Kilham, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice Goodale, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Goodale em 22 de outubro de 1628, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1666, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katharine Kilham родилась около 1605 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Kilham было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Goodale, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Goodale 22 октября 1628 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 10 сентября 1666 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Robert Goodale el 22 de octubre de 1628, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1666, en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años.
